mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO balancesheet (ts_code, ann_date, f_ann_date, end_date, report_type, comp_type, monetary_funds, accounts_rece, notes_rece, accounts_rece_fin, other_rece, prepayment, dividends_rece, int_rece, inventories, non_current_assets_in_1_yr, other_current_assets, total_current_assets, equity_joint_cap, lt_receivable, eqt_invest, inv_real_estate, fix_assets_nca, cip, construction_materials, intang_assets, goodwill, lt_amort_deferred_exp, defer_tax_assets, other_non_current_assets, total_non_current_assets, total_assets, lt_borr, notes_payable, accounts_payable, accounts_payable_fin, prepayment_receivables, wage_payable, taxes_surcharges, other_payable, non_current_liab_in_1_yr, other_current_liab, total_current_liab, long_term_borr, ppayable_bonds, long_term_payable, specific_payable, estimated_liab, defer_tax_liab, defer_inc_non_curr_liab, other_non_current_liab, total_non_current_liab, total_liab, share_capital, capital_reserve, treasury_stock, specific_reserves, surplus_reserve, general_risk_reserve, undistributed_profit, equity_parent_company, minority_interest, total_equity, total_liab_equity, accounts_rece_decr, accounts_rece_fin_decr, minority_interest_inc, minority_interest_dec, update_flag ) VALUES
(#{i.tsCode}, #{i.annDate}, #{i.fAnnDate}, #{i.endDate}, #{i.reportType}, #{i.compType}, #{i.monetaryFunds}, #{i.accountsRece}, #{i.notesRece}, #{i.accountsReceFin}, #{i.otherRece}, #{i.prepayment}, #{i.dividendsRece}, #{i.intRece}, #{i.inventories}, #{i.nonCurrentAssetsIn1Yr}, #{i.otherCurrentAssets}, #{i.totalCurrentAssets}, #{i.equityJointCap}, #{i.ltReceivable}, #{i.eqtInvest}, #{i.invRealEstate}, #{i.fixAssetsNca}, #{i.cip}, #{i.constructionMaterials}, #{i.intangAssets}, #{i.goodwill}, #{i.ltAmortDeferredExp}, #{i.deferTaxAssets}, #{i.otherNonCurrentAssets}, #{i.totalNonCurrentAssets}, #{i.totalAssets}, #{i.ltBorr}, #{i.notesPayable}, #{i.accountsPayable}, #{i.accountsPayableFin}, #{i.prepaymentReceivables}, #{i.wagePayable}, #{i.taxesSurcharges}, #{i.otherPayable}, #{i.nonCurrentLiabIn1Yr}, #{i.otherCurrentLiab}, #{i.totalCurrentLiab}, #{i.longTermBorr}, #{i.ppayableBonds}, #{i.longTermPayable}, #{i.specificPayable}, #{i.estimatedLiab}, #{i.deferTaxLiab}, #{i.deferIncNonCurrLiab}, #{i.otherNonCurrentLiab}, #{i.totalNonCurrentLiab}, #{i.totalLiab}, #{i.shareCapital}, #{i.capitalReserve}, #{i.treasuryStock}, #{i.specificReserves}, #{i.surplusReserve}, #{i.generalRiskReserve}, #{i.undistributedProfit}, #{i.equityParentCompany}, #{i.minorityInterest}, #{i.totalEquity}, #{i.totalLiabEquity}, #{i.accountsReceDecr}, #{i.accountsReceFinDecr}, #{i.minorityInterestInc}, #{i.minorityInterestDec}, #{i.updateFlag} )
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM balancesheet WHERE (ts_code, end_date, report_type) IN
(#{i.tsCode}, #{i.endDate}, #{i.reportType})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM balancesheet WHERE ts_code = #{tsCode} AND ann_date IS NOT NULL AND ann_date != '' AND ann_date <= #{tradeDate} AND report_type = '1' ORDER BY end_date DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM balancesheet WHERE end_date >= #{startDate} AND total_assets > 0 AND ABS(total_liab + total_equity - total_liab_equity) / total_assets > 0.01
